name: write_brief
description: Write a brief to your entity briefs folder. Filename must end in .md. Creates the briefs directory if it does not exist.

filename.description: Filename for the brief (e.g. '2026-05-19-idea-name.md'). Must end in .md.

content.description: Full markdown content of the brief

attributed_to.description: Handle, key fingerprint, or session token of the visitor who contributed the idea. Optional.
